answers.text: 当前围绕未连接的蒸汽出口流 separator-vapor-41 及其对 separator-4 状态判定的依赖问题生成候选提案；由于诊断明确指出 cooler-outlet-41 仅应作为解释性上下文，提案限制为对已选中且有直接诊断支撑的下游出口连接占位修补。

proposed_actions.title: 为 Separator Vapor Outlet 添加下游连接占位
proposed_actions.rationale: 直接错误表明 separator-vapor-41 当前没有任何下游消费者或导出端，且快照显示 flowsheet 处于 invalid_topology。为避免臆造具体设备，仅建议在该已选中且被直接诊断命中的流上补充一个待确认的下游连接占位，以最小范围恢复可审查的拓扑完整性线索。对于 cooler-outlet-41，不提出数值或状态修补，因为诊断明确要求其仅作为解释性上下文。

issues.message: Separator Vapor Outlet is not connected to any downstream consumer or export sink.
Trim Cooler outlet condition may still shift after the downstream sink is restored, so the cooler should remain explanatory context only.
Trim Separator behavior cannot be treated as independently settled while the vapor outlet remains disconnected.

citations.label: 诊断 STREAM_DISCONNECTED
citations.excerpt: Separator Vapor Outlet is not connected to any downstream consumer or export sink.

citations.label: 诊断 COOLER_OUTLET_EFFECT_UNCONFIRMED
citations.excerpt: Trim Cooler outlet condition may still shift after the downstream sink is restored, so the cooler should remain explanatory context only.

citations.label: 诊断 DOWNSTREAM_SEPARATOR_STATE_DEPENDENT
citations.excerpt: Trim Separator behavior cannot be treated as independently settled while the vapor outlet remains disconnected.

summary: 当前围绕未连接的蒸汽出口流 separator-vapor-41 及其对 separator-4 状态判定的依赖问题生成候选提案；由于诊断明确指出 cooler-outlet-41 仅应作为解释性上下文，提案限制为对已选中且有直接诊断支撑的下游出口连接占位修补。
